---
name: Challenge proposal
about: Propose a new challenge or meaningful revision to an existing one
title: "[Challenge] "
labels: challenge
assignees: ""
---

## Archetype

- Broken System Investigation
- Architecture Thought Experiment
- Tool Steering Challenge

## Summary

Describe the challenge in one or two paragraphs.

## Intended Signals

What engineering competence should this challenge surface?

## Proposed Artifacts

List the artifacts the challenge would include.

## Why This Is Not Gimmicky

Explain why the challenge reflects plausible engineering work and does not reduce to a trick.

## Reviewer Considerations

How should reviewers think about strong vs weak responses?
